commit.message:
Reorganize tests to be in the appropriate files

Instead of dumping all tests in the TestUnsignedComparison.java, which
wasn't the right place for the tests related to how ADD and XOR nodes
are idealized, this patch now places them in the files that are better
aligned with the checks.  This patch also introduces new tests in
TestUnsignedComparison.java that check whether XOR-based unsigned
comparisons are optimized away, just like the existing ADD-based
unsigned comparisons.
